aloof_plane_octopus_aspire: We are a student research group operating at the Institute of Computer Science. We are united by a passion for technology – from low-level theory to practical implementations.
inner_grand_sloth_aid: We operate socially, technically, and scientifically.
cuddly_born_skunk_wave: Either something broke, or you were looking for luck on our website. We assure you that the only luck is hidden in room 24 at the Institute of Computer Science!
direct_next_newt_relish: Feel free to visit us in your spare time, and now click here to return home.
true_mean_trout_hush: // Winter Camp of Computer Science Students
crazy_strong_antelope_climb: Winter Camp of Computer Science Students (ZOSIA) is an event organized by the Computer Science Students' Association for over 20 years. The history of the camp began with informal trips of a group of friends; today, it brings together nearly 300 people every year: students from various universities, representatives of academia, and IT companies.
dizzy_full_anaconda_nourish: During the three-day trip, there are lectures, company presentations, as well as excursions and integration parties. ZOSIA traditionally takes place at the turn of February and March, sharing a passion for technology in a unique winter atmosphere.
lucky_tired_seal_dine: Archaeologists are wondering if ZOSIA {year} even took place. No evidence found...
lower_sour_tiger_gaze: We don't have photos from this edition of ZOSIA. If you have any, you can send them to us so we can post them here.
zippy_steep_shell_dash: Can a Slime Mold train Neural Networks?
helpful_gaudy_cheetah_breathe: Visualization of U-Matrix, Hit Map, and Weight Vectors
giant_grand_mayfly_pout: This project explores the fascinating intersection of biology and computer science, testing whether the natural processes of <em class="italic text-base-content font-serif" >Physarum polycephalum</em > can be used to perform computational tasks, such as training neural networks.
spicy_dry_peacock_cure: Behavioral and experimental research on <em class="italic font-serif" >Physarum polycephalum</em >.
suave_many_squid_adore: Algorithmic analysis and modeling of transport networks.
wide_kind_jan_aim: Disseminating results within and beyond the academic community.
